title: The AAIB has sent a team of inspectors to Ashbourne, Derbyshire
body: "An accident in the Ashbourne area of Derbyshire involving a light aircaft has been notified to the AAIB. An investigation has been launched and a multidisciplinary team of inspectors are on their way to the accident site.     Media enquiries:      During office hours 01932 440015   Out of office hours 0300 777 7878    "
